description: UVM verification environment wrapping the AXI4 wide interconnect. Each AXI4 UVC has five per-channel agents (AW, W, B for write; AR, R for read), each encapsulating a sequencer, driver and monitor. Agents connect to the DUT crossbar via virtual interfaces. Read and write scoreboards receive monitor transactions via TLM analysis ports. Read and write sequences drive agents via TLM seq_item ports. All TLM connections are internal to the environment — no external TLM ports.

testbench.description: Top-level testbench. Drives clk/rst and connects virtual interfaces between the DUT interconnect and per-channel UVC agents.

uvm_env.description: Top-level UVM environment. Contains all per-channel agents, read/write scoreboards and read/write sequences. All TLM connections are internal.

axi4_interconnect.description: AXI4 crossbar / interconnect (DUT). Routes transactions from master ports to slave ports based on address decoding. This is the real RTL design under verification.

uvm_read_scoreboard.description: Read scoreboard. Receives transactions from AR and R channel monitors via TLM analysis ports and checks end-to-end read data integrity.

ports.name: analysis_export
ports.description: Analysis export for AR/R monitor transactions

uvm_write_scoreboard.description: Write scoreboard. Receives transactions from AW, W and B channel monitors via TLM analysis ports and checks end-to-end write data integrity.

ports.name: analysis_export
ports.description: Analysis export for AW/W/B monitor transactions

instances.description: Top-level UVM environment — contains all per-channel agents, scoreboards and sequences
AXI4 crossbar / interconnect (DUT under verification)
Read sequence — generates AR/R stimulus items, connects to AR and R sequencers via TLM
Write sequence — generates AW/W/B stimulus items, connects to AW, W and B sequencers via TLM
Read scoreboard — checks end-to-end data integrity using AR and R monitor transactions
Write scoreboard — checks end-to-end data integrity using AW, W and B monitor transactions
CPU master AW channel agent — encapsulates sequencer, driver and monitor for AW channel
CPU master W channel agent — encapsulates sequencer, driver and monitor for W channel
CPU master B channel agent — encapsulates sequencer, driver and monitor for B channel
CPU master AR channel agent — encapsulates sequencer, driver and monitor for AR channel
CPU master R channel agent — encapsulates sequencer, driver and monitor for R channel

DMA master R channel agent — encapsulates sequencer, driver and monitor for R channel

GPU master W channel agent — encapsulates sequencer, driver and monitor for W channel
GPU master B channel agent — encapsulates sequencer, driver and monitor for B channel
GPU master AR channel agent — encapsulates sequencer, driver and monitor for AR channel
GPU master R channel agent — encapsulates sequencer, driver and monitor for R channel
SRAM slave AW channel agent — encapsulates sequencer, driver and monitor for AW channel
SRAM slave W channel agent — encapsulates sequencer, driver and monitor for W channel
SRAM slave B channel agent — encapsulates sequencer, driver and monitor for B channel
SRAM slave AR channel agent — encapsulates sequencer, driver and monitor for AR channel
SRAM slave R channel agent — encapsulates sequencer, driver and monitor for R channel
DDR slave AW channel agent — encapsulates sequencer, driver and monitor for AW channel
DDR slave W channel agent — encapsulates sequencer, driver and monitor for W channel
DDR slave B channel agent — encapsulates sequencer, driver and monitor for B channel
DDR slave AR channel agent — encapsulates sequencer, driver and monitor for AR channel
DDR slave R channel agent — encapsulates sequencer, driver and monitor for R channel
UART slave AW channel agent — encapsulates sequencer, driver and monitor for AW channel
UART slave W channel agent — encapsulates sequencer, driver and monitor for W channel
UART slave B channel agent — encapsulates sequencer, driver and monitor for B channel
UART slave AR channel agent — encapsulates sequencer, driver and monitor for AR channel
UART slave R channel agent — encapsulates sequencer, driver and monitor for R channel
SPI slave AW channel agent — encapsulates sequencer, driver and monitor for AW channel
SPI slave W channel agent — encapsulates sequencer, driver and monitor for W channel
SPI slave B channel agent — encapsulates sequencer, driver and monitor for B channel
SPI slave AR channel agent — encapsulates sequencer, driver and monitor for AR channel
SPI slave R channel agent — encapsulates sequencer, driver and monitor for R channel
